name: Sauce Bechamel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add flour and whisk until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk while whisking to avoid lumps.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and comes to a simmer.
5. Remove from heat and stir in grated Swiss cheese until melted and smooth.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
